name: colormath
description: Plugins for repos built on the colormath (ColorMath/ci) shared infrastructure.

plugins.name: colormath
plugins.description: Skills for the colormath gates + review pipeline: /colormath:ship takes a branch through PR, gates, review, and the PR's generated test plan — which it executes against the running stack — fixes the findings, then auto-merges when clean or holds and explains; /colormath:qa QAs a focus area against the running stack then hands the fixes to ship.
